response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled full-stack engineer with ~20 years of hands-on experience and genuine breadth across systems, but this role calls for a director-level AI strategist with recognized expertise in building AI products at scale, executive advisory experience, and ideally an advanced degree in an AI-related field. His AI work is very recent (current role only) and limited to tooling/infrastructure rather than platform-level AI product leadership. There is no evidence of advising strategic customers, influencing organizational AI direction, or operating at the seniority level this position requires.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — well above the 15-year minimum
Active work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq signals current, hands-on AI tooling exposure
Demonstrated entrepreneurial streak via GISCollective (2016–present), an open-source geo-data platform in active use by real organizations
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related technical field; education stops at two bachelor's degrees (CS and Fine Arts)
AI experience is shallow and very recent — no track record of building or shipping recognized AI products or platforms at meaningful scale
No evidence of director-level scope: no team leadership, no strategic customer advisory, no organizational influence or public AI thought leadership beyond a single GIS conference talk

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI depth and recognized expertise
No director-level or strategic advisory experience
Long engineering career with recent AI tooling work
